query: A lightful living room, small bedroom and tiny kitchen

objects.description: A modern, light-gray fabric three-seater sofa with clean lines and tapered wooden legs, designed for comfort and a bright, airy aesthetic.
A mid-century style armchair in soft beige velvet with walnut legs, providing a cozy accent seating option.
A rectangular wooden coffee table with a light oak finish and minimalist metal frame, suitable for a modern living room.
A low-profile white lacquer entertainment unit with two cabinets and open shelving, designed to hold media devices and decor.
A tall, narrow bookshelf in natural wood finish with five open shelves, ideal for displaying books and small decor items.
A round side table with a marble top and gold metal base, complementing the sofa and armchair.
A minimalist wooden platform bed with a light oak finish and clean lines, suitable for a small bedroom. No box spring required, low profile to maintain an open feel.
A narrow 5-drawer dresser in matching light oak finish, vertical design to save floor space while offering ample storage. Rounded edges for safety and modern appeal.
A compact rectangular shelf nightstand made of light oak wood, mounted on the wall beside the bed. Includes a small open cubby for extra storage.
A floor-to-ceiling wardrobe with mirrored double doors and internal shelving and hanging space. Slim depth to fit small rooms, modern silver handles.
A narrow horizontal shelf made of light oak, mounted above the bed or beside the dresser. Used for decorative display.
An oval-shaped floor mirror with a thin black metal frame, slightly tilted for functionality. Lightweight and space-saving.

Upper and lower kitchen cabinets with white glossy finish and modern handleless design, arranged along one wall to maximize storage. Includes base cabinets (lower) and wall-mounted cabinets (upper) with under-cabinet lighting.
Quartz countertop in light gray with a seamless integrated stainless steel sink. Positioned on top of base cabinets, spanning the length of the cabinet run.
Compact kitchen island with wooden top and white lower cabinet, including a small breakfast bar with two stools. Designed to fit in tight spaces with open shelving underneath.
Slim, energy-efficient upright refrigerator in stainless steel with a front panel display. Narrow footprint to fit in small kitchens.
Built-in ceramic electric cooktop with four burners, installed on the countertop near the wall cabinets.
Modern stainless steel range hood mounted above the cooktop, slim profile to save space and maintain visual lightness.
Compact countertop microwave with digital display and turntable, in white finish to match kitchen theme.
Wall-mounted open shelf unit made of light oak wood and black metal brackets, installed on a free wall to display kitchenware and add visual warmth.

objects_on_top.object_name: mini hanging plant in macrame holder
